description_long: This house features a large, multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs, providing substantial coverage and architectural interest. The exterior is primarily dark with contrasting white window frames, and the structure includes a spacious wraparound balcony supported by posts. Multiple sets of windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the house appears to have two main stories. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps leading to a covered porch area, which is integrated into the balcony. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional Alpine chalet and modern residential styles, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and panoramic views.
description: A two-story house with a large, multi-gabled roof, dark exterior, white-trimmed windows, and a wraparound balcony supported by posts.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front and side of the house, showing the main balcony, multiple windows, and the deep overhanging roof.
description_view_1: The rear view displays symmetrical rows of windows and the extension of the balcony, with the roof's slope clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the house, the gabled roof, and a smaller set of windows on the lower level.
description_view_3: The opposite end view shows the full width of the roof and the supporting posts beneath the balcony, with minimal window visibility.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, integrated into a wraparound balcony, featuring a simple main door and overhanging roof
